description: Establish an emergency communication infrastructure in BlueMail. Create three folders named 'Incident-Infrastructure', 'Incident-Security', and 'Incident-Software', and move at least five relevant technical or issue-related emails from the inbox into these folders. Prepare three draft template emails for future incidents: one to infra-alerts@company.com with 'Infrastructure' in the subject, one to security-team@company.com with 'Security' in the subject, and one to engineering@company.com with 'Software' in the subject, including placeholders like 'affected systems' or 'recovery time' in the bodies. Draft a final confirmation email to cto@company.com stating that the folders and templates are ready.
